name: JumpCloud Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures JumpCloud access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT j.id, j.username, j.email, e.termination_date FROM jumpcloud_users j JOIN employees e ON LOWER(j.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(j.suspended, false) = false AND COALESCE(j.activated, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
